mapper.sql: select g.record_id, g.external_company_id, g.external_company_name_snapshot, g.dept_id, d.dept_name, g.source_dept_id, sd.dept_name as source_dept_name, g.gateway_id, gw.imei as matched_gateway_imei, fp.fire_point_name as matched_fire_point_name, m.dept_id as mapped_dept_id, md.dept_name as mapped_dept_name, g.gateway_config_code, g.gateway_qr_code, g.gateway_imei, g.sim_no, g.sim_open_month, g.placement_location, g.status, g.match_status, g.installer_name, g.install_time, ( select count(1) from fe_sensor_manual_record s where s.gateway_record_id = g.record_id and s.status <> 'void' ) as sensor_count, ( select group_concat(s.sensor_code order by s.sensor_record_id separator ', ') from fe_sensor_manual_record s where s.gateway_record_id = g.record_id and s.status <> 'void' and s.sensor_code is not null and s.sensor_code <> '' ) as sensor_code_summary, g.remark, g.create_by, g.create_time, g.update_by, g.update_time from fe_gateway_manual_record g left join sys_dept d on g.dept_id = d.dept_id left join sys_dept sd on g.source_dept_id = sd.dept_id left join fe_gateway gw on g.gateway_id = gw.gateway_id left join fe_fire_point fp on gw.fire_point_id = fp.fire_point_id left join fe_company_dept_mapping m on g.external_company_id = m.external_company_id left join sys_dept md on m.dept_id = md.dept_id
mapper.insert:
insert into fe_gateway_manual_record
external_company_id, external_company_name_snapshot, dept_id, source_dept_id, gateway_id, gateway_config_code, gateway_qr_code, gateway_imei, sim_no, sim_open_month, placement_location, status, match_status, installer_name, install_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{externalCompanyId}, #{externalCompanyNameSnapshot}, #{deptId}, #{sourceDeptId}, #{gatewayId}, #{gatewayConfigCode}, #{gatewayQrCode}, #{gatewayImei}, #{simNo}, #{simOpenMonth}, #{placementLocation}, #{status}, #{matchStatus}, #{installerName}, #{installTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
